name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Located at 8426 Vine St #5, Cincinnati, OH 45216, US Cash Advance can be reached at +1 513-450-3951.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates physical lending locations across multiple US cities, including a Detroit, MI branch at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd and a Charlotte, NC address listed in their footer. The Detroit location runs extended hours — weekdays until 9pm and weekends until 7pm — and serves walk-in borrowers alongside an online inquiry process. The company holds a 4.4 customer rating, with reviewers specifically naming in-store staff by name and citing fast turnaround times.

Their core products are payday loans and cash advances capped at $1,000, marketed to borrowers who need fast cash before their next paycheck. They also advertise bad credit personal loans ranging from $250 to $50,000, same-day loans, debt consolidation, and personal loans for bad credit. No collateral is required, and the company explicitly welcomes all credit types including poor and no-credit borrowers.

What distinguishes US Cash Advance operationally is their hybrid model: borrowers can apply in person (where staff like Doris in Detroit handle the process face-to-face) or submit an online inquiry form. Customer reviews cite in-store visits lasting under 45 minutes from application to approval. The company's stated process connects borrowers with 'a trusted third-party lender' after submitting the inquiry form, indicating they function partly as a loan matching intermediary rather than exclusively as a direct lender.

Honestly, several caution flags are worth noting. The business email on the Detroit location page uses a Kinsta cloud staging domain (env-uscashadvance-compliance.kinsta.cloud), which is atypical for an established lender and suggests the site may not be fully production-ready. No APR ranges, fee structures, or repayment term examples are disclosed anywhere on the visible page — a significant transparency gap for a lender in a high-cost loan category. One customer review also references 'Express Payday Loans' rather than US Cash Advance, raising questions about review authenticity. Borrowers should request full cost disclosures before signing any contract.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 9pm and weekend hours until 7pm at the Detroit location
In-store option with named staff (Doris cited in multiple reviews) for face-to-face assistance
All credit types accepted — no minimum credit score requirement stated
No collateral required for any loan product
Same-day funding available on cash advance and same-day loan products
4.4 customer rating with specific positive mentions of clear repayment term explanations
Minimum paperwork process with a simple online inquiry form entry point
cons: Functions partly as a loan matching service — online applicants are connected to third-party lenders, not necessarily borrowing directly from US Cash Advance
No APR, fee, or repayment term examples disclosed on the location page — cost of borrowing is entirely opaque before applying
Business contact email uses a Kinsta staging domain rather than a professional business address, which is a credibility concern
One review references a different company ('Express Payday Loans'), casting doubt on the authenticity of some testimonials
No online pre-approval tool — a reviewer specifically flagged this as a gap compared to competitors
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers who prefer in-person loan assistance over online-only lenders
Borrowers with bad or no credit who need $1,000 or less before their next paycheck
People facing a one-time emergency expense (medical bill, car repair) who need same-day cash
Borrowers comfortable with a loan matching process where a third party ultimately funds the loan
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for Detroit-area borrowers with poor credit who need up to $1,000 quickly and prefer in-person service with extended hours. The main caveat is that online applicants are routed to third-party lenders rather than borrowing directly, and no cost information (APR, fees) is disclosed upfront — borrowers must complete the application to learn the actual terms.
services: Online loan inquiry form with third-party lender matching
